title: fyi-archive: A read-only full-site archive of fyi.org.nz (NZ Official Information Act request register)
description: Incremental, read-only archive of fyi.org.nz, the New Zealand Official Information Act (OIA) request register (Alaveteli). Published snapshots include request metadata, rendered pages, and WARC/WACZ capture artifacts, distributed through Hugging Face and draft-first Zenodo deposits while historical backfill continues. Capture is performed by fyi-cli; this repository is the orchestration and distribution layer.
